receivedPermissions.description: blacklist addresses, freezing any interactions with the USDC token for them.

entries.name: CometRewards
entries.description: CometRewards - distributes COMP rewards across Comet markets

entries.name: ConfiguratorProxy
entries.description: Configurator proxy - stores per-market parameters consumed by ProxyAdmin.deployAndUpgradeTo

entries.name: cUSDTv3
entries.description: Compound v3 USDT market - lending pool for USDT

entries.name: cwstETHv3
entries.description: Compound v3 wstETH market - lending pool for wstETH

receivedPermissions.description: pause the USDC token (no transfers, mints, burns).

entries.name: cUSDCv3
